name: Dragon Gate Wholesale
description: Leading supplier of electronics components, consumer goods, and factory-direct merchandise. MOQ from 100 units. OEM/ODM available. 15 years exporting to 60+ countries.

name: Lagos Prime Properties
description: Full-service real estate agency specializing in residential and commercial properties across Lagos, Abuja, and Port Harcourt. Trusted by diaspora investors worldwide.

name: Spice Route Foods
description: Authentic Indian restaurant chain and catering service. Specializing in Mughlai, South Indian, and fusion cuisine. Available for corporate events and private celebrations.

name: Gulf Nexus Trading
description: Dubai-based import/export house handling commodities, luxury goods, and industrial equipment. Licensed by Dubai Trade Authority. Free Zone certified for tax-free operations.

name: BrightPath EdTech
description: Online training platform for business professionals. Courses in leadership, AI literacy, and entrepreneurship. 4,000+ learners in 30 countries. Certificate programs available.

name: SolarEdge Kenya
description: Off-grid solar energy solutions for homes, farms, and small businesses across East Africa. Installation, maintenance, and financing options. Partnered with World Bank green initiative.

name: Sao Paulo Auto Parts
description: Wholesale and retail automotive parts supplier. Specializes in OEM and aftermarket parts for Brazilian, Japanese, and European vehicles. Ships across Latin America.

name: Berlin FinTech Solutions
description: B2B financial software and consulting for European SMEs. Specializes in compliance automation, payment processing integration, and SEPA solutions. ISO 27001 certified.

name: Manila Fashion Hub
description: Designer and retail collective featuring Filipino fashion brands. Custom garment manufacturing available at competitive rates. Exports to US, EU, and Middle East markets.

name: Accra Tech Builders
description: West Africa's leading software development agency. Builds mobile apps, e-commerce platforms, and fintech products. Remote-first team of 40+ engineers. Agile delivery.

name: Seoul Beauty Wholesale
description: K-Beauty wholesale distributor. Skincare, cosmetics, and wellness products from top Korean brands. MOQ 50 units. Private label options. Ships globally with competitive pricing.

name: Riyadh Construction Group
description: Licensed construction and project management firm operating across the GCC. Residential towers, commercial complexes, and Vision 2030 projects. SASO certified contractors.

name: Sydney Travel Escapes
description: Boutique travel agency curating luxury and adventure experiences across the Pacific. Specializes in honeymoons, corporate retreats, and Aboriginal cultural immersion tours.

name: Ho Chi Minh Ag Exports
description: Premium Vietnamese agricultural exporter. Coffee, rice, cashews, and tropical fruits. GlobalGAP certified. Direct from farm pricing. Partnering with international food importers.

name: Toronto Business Lawyers
description: Full-service business law firm specializing in immigration, corporate formation, M&A, and cross-border deals. Serving entrepreneurs and multinationals. Free initial consultation.

name: Kuala Lumpur Retail Co.
description: Multi-brand retail operator with 12 locations across Malaysia. Carrying electronics, fashion, and lifestyle goods. Franchise and partnership opportunities available.

name: Paris Luxury Connect
description: Exclusive talent and brand agency connecting luxury brands with top European content creators, influencers, and media personalities. Campaigns in fashion, travel, and gastronomy.

name: Jakarta Matchmakers
description: Professional matchmaking and relationship coaching service for Indonesian professionals and diaspora. Confidential, culturally sensitive, and success-focused. 500+ happy couples.

name: Cape Town Vineyard Estate
description: Award-winning wine estate and farm restaurant in the Cape Winelands. Private tastings, cellar tours, and bespoke event hosting. Export-quality wines available internationally.

name: London AI Ventures
description: Early-stage venture capital fund focused on AI, climate tech, and fintech startups across Europe and Africa. Ticket sizes £100k–£2M. Founder-friendly with active portfolio support.
